1000659256.english: If you wanted to dress them in reverse bunny suits so badly, you could have just made a bunch and handed them out.
1000659256.korean: 그렇게 역바니를 입히고 싶으시면 그냥 대량으로 만들어서 뿌리시면 됐잖아요.

1000659257.english: - As I racked my brain, at a loss for how to respond to such a realistic remark, someone plopped down next to us.
1000659257.korean: - 너무 현실적인 말에 대답이 궁해진 내가 머리를 굴리고 있을 때, 우리 옆에 누군가 털썩 주저앉았다.

1000659258.english: Hehe. It feels good to move my body vigorously after a long time.
1000659258.korean: 헤헷. 간만에 신나게 몸 움직이니까 좋네.

1000659259.english: BaekTo...? Ah, you mean the descendants of the Moon People?

1000659260.english: Hehe, after talking to him a bit, he turned out to be a nicer guy than I expected.
1000659260.korean: 니히히, 이야기를 좀 해보니까 생각보다 좋은 녀석이더라구.

1000659261.english: I hate to admit it, but it seems not all bunny girls are bad guys. And so is King Bunny.
1000659261.korean: 인정하긴 싫지만, 바니걸이라고 다 나쁜 녀석들은 아닌 것 같아. 바니 대왕 씨도 그렇고.

1000659262.english: Well, that doesn't mean I completely forgave them! I'm a Bunny Slayer after all!
1000659262.korean: 그, 그렇다고 완전히 녀석들은 용서한 건 아냐! 나는 어쨌든 바니 슬레이어니까!

1000659263.english: Then the character will fall apart!

1000659265.english: - Lying spread-eagled on the lawn, NiBA rested her face on my chest and said with a cool smile.
1000659265.korean: - 잔디밭에 대자로 누워있는 내 가슴팍에 얼굴을 올린 니바는 시원한 미소를 지으며 말했다.

1000659267.english: - Hearing that, many thoughts came to mind.

1000659268.english: King Bunny was fun too! Huh? Huh?
1000659268.korean: 바니 대왕 씨도 재밌었지! 응? 응응?

1000659269.english: - I sat up and looked at the other members.

1000659270.english: - It was a small commotion, but...

1000659271.english: Hmm. I can't agree with that opinion, First Officer Sirene.
1000659271.korean: 흠. 그 의견에는 동의할 수 없군, 세이렌 부함장.

1000659272.english: The commander has already made the decision.

1000659273.english: But, you didn't force me, did you...?

1000659274.english: Reverse Vanilla A1... Is this the beginning of a new era...?

1000659275.english: - It's become quite a commotion, and it doesn't seem like it'll be over anytime soon, but...
1000659275.korean: - 꽤 큰 소동이 됐고, 금방 끝날 것 같지는 않지만...

1000659276.english: - Answering NiBA and looking at Perrault, Perrault let out a deep sigh.
1000659276.korean: - 니바에게 대답하고 페로를 바라보자, 페로는 한숨을 포옥 내쉬었다.

1000659280.english: I tried to hold back, but I can't anymore. You, Bunny Cat! I'm going to have to take care of you myself!
1000659280.korean: 참으려고 했는데 안되겠어. 너, 바니 고양이! 너만큼은 내가 손봐줘야겠어!

1000659282.english: A bunny girl with cat ears and a tail! I'll never tolerate such an apostle!
1000659282.korean: 고양이 귀랑 꼬리를 달고 바니걸이라니! 그런 사도, 용납할까보냐!

1000659285.english: Show some respect for the bunny girl, you jerk! Don't take it off right now!
1000659285.korean: 바니걸에 대한 경의를 보여라, 이녀석! 당장 떼어내지 못해!

1000659288.english: N, you... Is that a real cat...? Cat, why...?
1000659288.korean: ㄴ, 너... 지, 진짜 고양이...? 고양이, 왜...?

1000659292.english: - I sat up and headed toward the members who were now engaged in a heated debate on the topic of "Which is better, a bunny girl or a reverse bunny girl?"
1000659292.korean: - 몸을 일으켜 이제는 ‘바니걸과 역바니, 무엇이 옳은가’라는 주제로 격렬한 토론을 벌이고 있는 대원들에게 향했다.

1000659293.english: - Of course, there are also members who don't really care about that and are doing what they want to do.
1000659293.korean: - 물론 그런 건 별로 신경쓰지 않고, 하고 싶은 일을 하고 있는 대원들도 있다.

1000659294.english: - The members are sitting together in groups, chatting, splashing in the fountain, and enjoying coffee and dessert at tables with umbrellas.
1000659294.korean: - 끼리끼리 모여 앉아서 담소를 나누고, 분수대에서 물장난을 치고, 파라솔이 딸린 테이블에서 커피와 디저트를 즐기는 대원들.

1000659295.english: - ... The way I really like it.

1000659296.english: - Until my vacation ends, I plan to enjoy it as much as possible. Talking with the crew, spending personal time, and egging them on to cause absurd incidents.
1000659296.korean: - 휴가가 끝날 때까지, 최대한 만끽할 생각이다. 대원들과 이야기하고, 개인적인 시간을 보내고, 부추겨서 엉뚱한 사건을 일으키면서.

1000659297.english: - If I'm with my beloved comrades, I know there will be many happy and enjoyable things to come...
1000659297.korean: - 사랑하는 대원들과 함께라면 앞으로도 행복하고 즐거운 일들이 많겠지만...

1000659298.english: - Because this moment, right now, will never come again.
1000659298.korean: - 지금 이 시간 만큼은, 다시는 돌아오지 않을 테니까.

1000659299.english: Bunny? NiBA! A chaotic reverse bunny girl commotion! To be continued in the epilog.
1000659299.korean: < 바니? 니바! 우당탕탕 역바니 대소동! > 후일담에서 계속.

1000659300.english: Why are you covering your face?

1000659306.english: Oh, that's right, that was the Setting.

1000659307.english: But... I can see it right away!
1000659307.korean: 하지만... 나는 바로 볼 수 있지!

1000659311.english: Huh? Really? Wouldn't that be even more embarrassing?
1000659311.korean: 응? 진짜? 그게 더 부끄럽지 않겠어?

1000659312.english: Um... alright. I'll leave it to you.

1000659315.english: Y-you suddenly come out with that?!

1000659322.english: Then... sh-should we try something else?
1000659322.korean: 그럼... 우, 우리 다른 것도 해보지 않을래?

1000659325.english: - That's not really right, is it? Haha, then...
1000659325.korean: -다는 건 역시 좀 그렇지? 하하, 그럼...

1000659326.english: Uh... umm... like going out together or eating something delicious...?
1000659326.korean: 으, 으음... 같이 놀러가거나, 맛있는 걸 먹거나...?

1000659328.english: Really? I'll go get it right away.

1000659334.english: What we talked about yesterday... is it okay?

1000659339.english: I don't need to prepare anything, right?

1000659341.english: This really feels bad every time it happens...
1000659341.korean: 이거, 당할 때마다 영 기분 나쁘단 말이지...

1000659343.english: But does that actually get fixed?

1000659344.english: Hmm... so you couldn't feel the sensation when you were in dragon form?
1000659344.korean: 음... 그럼 드래곤 모습일때는 감촉을 못 느꼈던거야?

1000659346.english: You said it seems to be in the mind, not the body? Isn't that a lack of mental strength?
1000659346.korean: 몸이 아니라 정신에 있는 것 같다며? 정신력 부족아냐?

1000659347.english: Did you just not bother to try...?

1000659356.english: ...Enough. I get what you mean. Sorry.

1000659368.english: Now's your chance. Hurry and take care of it!

1000659384.english: You haven't even said anything yet...

1000659395.english: Now, Titania. Hurry up and show me your charm as a reverse bunny-
1000659395.korean: 자아, 티타니아. 너도 어서 내게 역바니로서의 매력을-

1000659397.english: Th-then why did you follow NiBA?
1000659397.korean: 그, 그럼 왜 니바를 따라 온거야?

1000659399.english: I want to make all the members into reverse Big Sis.

1000659403.english: ...Hmm, before we get serious, let's have some time to bond-
1000659403.korean: ...흠, 본격적으로 시작하기 전에 친목 도모의 시간을-

1000659406.english: Catch them all and make them wear reverse bunny suits!

1000659407.english: M-5 Efreeti... so you've made up your mind-NiBA?

1000659410.english: W-wait a moment. Magical BaekTo. I can explain everything...!
1000659410.korean: 자, 잠깐만. 백토. 내가 다 설명할 수 있어...!

1000659418.english: C-could you put that carrot down and talk to me...?
1000659418.korean: 다, 당근 좀 내려 놓고 말해줄래...?

1000659435.english: Well, that's enough. It's a rare break, isn't it?
1000659435.korean: 그럼 됐지 뭐. 모처럼의 휴식인데. 안그래?

1000659441.english: - As I entered the familiar captain's cabin and closed the door, the boisterous noise abruptly stopped.
1000659441.korean: - 익숙한 함장실에 들어서 문을 닫자, 떠들썩한 소리가 뚝 멎었다.

1000659442.english: - Sitting at my desk, I gazed at the monitor, where images of the crew members enjoying their vacation in various ways appeared.
1000659442.korean: - 책상에 앉아 모니터에 떠오른, 각양각색의 방식으로 휴가를 즐기는 대원들의 모습에 눈길을 주었다.

1000659443.english: - My vacation is almost over. Just a few more days, and then... the days of work and battle will begin again.
1000659443.korean: - 휴가는 거의 끝나간다. 앞으로 며칠만 더 지나면 다시… 업무와 전투가 이어지는 날들이 시작되겠지.

1000659444.english: - I look at the members again. Faces that look so happy, they make me feel good just by looking at them.
1000659444.korean: - 다시 대원들의 모습을 바라본다. 너무나 행복해보이는, 보는 나도 덩달아 기분이 좋아지는 그런 얼굴들.

1000659445.english: - It's not new, but I reaffirmed that I would do anything to protect it.
1000659445.korean: - 새삼스럽지만, 그것을 지키기 위해서라면 무슨 일이라도 하겠다고 재차 다짐했다.

1000659446.english: - The crew doesn't seem to be thinking about sleeping at all yet, but it's already late.
1000659446.korean: - 대원들은 아직 전혀 잘 생각이 없어보이지만 이미 늦은 시간이다.

1000659447.english: - To enjoy the rest of my vacation to the fullest, I should probably get to bed early tonight.
1000659447.korean: - 남은 휴가를 최선을 다해서 즐기려면 오늘은 슬슬 자는게 좋겠지.

1000659448.english: - I turned off the monitor and lay down in bed.

1000659449.english: - Thinking about what happened during the vacation and what will happen tomorrow, I slowly and pleasantly drifted off to sleep.
1000659449.korean: - 휴가 기간 동안 있었던 일들, 그리고 내일 벌어질 일들을 생각하며 천천히, 기분 좋게 잠에 빠져 들었다.

1000659452.english: - I suddenly came to my senses at the familiar voice.

1000659453.english: - Perhaps because of the long vacation, I didn't feel like getting up right away, but the next voice that followed slowly began to bring my consciousness to the surface.
1000659453.korean: - 긴 휴가 때문인지 당장 일어날 마음은 들지 않았지만, 이어지는 또다른 목소리에 천천히 의식이 부상하기 시작한다.

1000659454.english: What are you doing, Commander? Get up quickly.

1000659457.english: - The sound of panting and the weight felt on my body.
1000659457.korean: - 헥헥대는 소리와 함께 몸 위에서 느껴지는 중량감.

1000659458.english: - Someone who had climbed on top of me persistently licked my mouth and jaw.
1000659458.korean: - 내 몸 위에 올라탄 누군가는 내 입과 턱을 집요하게 핥았다.

1000659459.english: Wow... they're still not getting up even after this.

1000659460.english: Heh heh, you must be tired. Let's come back in a little while.
1000659460.korean: 후후, 피곤하신가봐. 조금 이따가 다시 오자.

1000659461.korean: 안 돼. 벌써 준비 다 했는걸.

1000659464.english: - I can feel my face is already covered in saliva, even without looking.
1000659464.korean: - 보지 않아도 내 얼굴은 이미 침범벅인 것이 느껴진다.

1000659465.english: - I had no choice but to open my eyes.
1000659465.korean: - 별 수 없이 눈을 뜨기로 했다.

1000659466.english: - When I opened my eyes, there was a landscape that felt somehow familiar.
1000659466.korean: - 눈을 뜨자, 어쩐지 익숙한 풍경이 있었다.

1000659467.english: - Me lying down, Griffon and Constantia S2 looking down at me. And Bori.
1000659467.korean: - 누워 있는 나와, 그런 나를 내려다보는 그리폰과 콘스탄챠. 그리고 보리.

1000659468.english: - Now, with this familiar scenery that has become as commonplace as everyday life, I felt a strange itch in the corner of my heart.
1000659468.korean: - 이제는 일상과도 같아진 이 익숙한 풍경에, 어쩐지 가슴 한 켠이 근질거렸다.

1000659470.english: - In a daze, I took the warm, wet towel and wiped the saliva-covered face.
1000659470.korean: - 멍한 상태로 따뜻한 물로 적신 수건을 받아 침 범벅인 얼굴을 닦았다.

1000659471.english: So, when are you going to finish cleaning it all?

1000659472.english: Let me see that. I'll do it.

1000659473.english: - As I quietly let it, Griffon carefully wiped my face.
1000659473.korean: - 얌전히 몸을 맡기고 있자 그리폰은 꼼꼼히 내 얼굴을 닦아 주었다.

1000659474.english: Hmph, Griffon. You're being unusually nice today, aren't you?

1000659476.english: Just because today is a special day.

1000659477.english: - Finally, after rubbing my face vigorously, Griffon set the towel down.
1000659477.korean: - 마지막으로 내 얼굴을 세게 문지르고 나서 그리폰은 수건을 내려놓았다.

1000659480.english: - I barely managed to shake off the drowsiness and sat up.
1000659480.korean: - 간신히 수마를 뿌리치고 몸을 일으켜 앉았다.

1000659483.english: Because Griffon love seeing their masters defenseless after waking up. So, she said she'd come with me again today.
1000659483.korean: 그리폰은 자다 깨신 주인님의 무방비한 모습을 좋아하니까요. 그래서 오늘도 같이 오겠다고-

1000659484.english: Oh, no, it's not! Who would like something like this...

1000659485.english: Hurry up and take a shower.

1000659486.english: - I smiled at Griffon, who was avoiding my gaze, and headed to the shower room.
1000659486.korean: - 시선을 피하는 그리폰에게 웃어주고 샤워실로 향했다.

1000659488.english: If you're fully awake, let's go.

1000659494.english: - I hugged their waists and lay back down on the bed.
1000659494.korean: - 둘의 허리를 끌어안고 침대에 다시 누웠다.

1000659495.english: - I just realized why I felt that strange feeling a moment ago.
1000659495.korean: - 조금 전 묘한 기분이 들었던 이유를 깨달았다.

1000659496.english: - It was these two who found me three years ago. When I came to, I vaguely remember seeing the two of them looking down at me.
1000659496.korean: - 지금으로부터 3년 전, 나를 찾아냈던 것이 바로 이 둘이었지. 정신이 들었을 때 나를 내려다보던 둘의 모습이 어렴풋이 떠오른다.

1000659497.english: - But a lot has changed since then. P/A-00 Griffon sighing like that and Constantia S2 smiling awkwardly... I wouldn't have imagined that before... Wait?
1000659497.korean: - 하지만 그때랑은 많은 것이 바뀌었다. 이렇게 푹 한숨을 내쉬는 그리폰과 난처하게 웃는 콘스탄챠라니, 이전이라면 상상도… 어라?

1000659498.english: Ugh... what a truly foolish commander.

1000659500.english: Why wouldn't there be anything going on? I have a very important thing to do.
1000659500.korean: 별 일이 없긴 왜 없어? 제일 중요한 일이 있는데.

1000659502.english: Yes, Master. You should get up soon.
1000659502.korean: 네, 주인님. 어서 일어나시는 게 좋겠어요.

1000659503.english: - Confused, Constantia S2 handed me a suit.
1000659503.korean: - 혼란에 빠진 나에게 콘스탄챠는 정장 한 벌을 내밀었다.

1000659504.english: Would you mind trying it on? I prepared this because today is a special day.
1000659504.korean: 괜찮으시면 입어주시겠어요? 오늘은 특별한 날이니까 준비했어요.

1000659505.english: - Even after thinking it over carefully... could it be?!

1000659506.english: - Griffon, who had made a face as if my exaggeration was ridiculous, said something unexpected.
1000659506.korean: - 내 엄살에 어이없다는 듯한 표정을 지은 그리폰은, 뜻밖의 말을 했다.

1000659508.english: It's the commander's birthday today, isn't it?

1000659514.english: I should probably go to sleep soon...

1000659520.english: ...But what's that noise I've been hearing since earlier? Where are you going?

1000659521.english: You don't have any special plans today, do you? Oh, right.
1000659521.korean: 오늘 별다른 일과 없잖아. 아, 그렇지.

1000659522.english: Are you both doing okay today?
1000659522.korean: 오늘 둘 다 별 일 없지?

1000659525.english: I don't mind what you wear, but... a special occasion?
1000659525.korean: 입는 건 상관 없는데… 특별한 날이라니?

1000659528.english: Wow, I put on something a little revealing and teased you a bit, and you're already at your limit? I didn't think our Hot Pack was like that~ …Heh. Just kidding. I know that's not it. The fact that you like me this sincerely… I really… ah, I'm too embarrassed to say any more. I'll tell you next time. More importantly… our boyfriend, it must have been hard holding back~? After holding back that long… let's make it last a while…
1000659528.korean: 와우, 야한 옷 입고 유혹 좀 했다고 더 이상 못 참겠는 거야? 우리 핫팩, 그렇게 안 봤는데~ ...킥. 농담이야.&n아닌 거 알아. 나를... 이렇게 진심으로 좋아해 줘서 정말... 아, 부끄러워서 더는 말 못 하겠다.&n다음에 말해줄게. 그것보다... 우리 남친, 참느라 힘들었지~? 참았던 만큼... 오랫동안 하자...?

1000659529.english: Ahaha... actually, I wanted to be the first to say I like you and ask you to marry me... but I couldn't take that final step. ...Yeah. I'm timid. Still, since the Commander came to me instead of me approaching, I'm truly happy. ...Thank you, Commander. I really, really like you.
1000659529.korean: 아하하... 사실, 내가 먼저 좋아한다고, 결혼해달라고 말하고 싶었는데...&n마지막 한 발을 못 내딛었었어. ...응. 어쨌거나 난 소심하니까. 그래도 내가 못 다가가는 만큼,&n사령관이 이렇게 다가와 주니까... 정말로 기뻐. ...고마워, 사령관. 정말정말 좋아해.

1000659530.english: The Commander is someone even I find hard to fully understand. Sometimes you laugh and act like a boy, and at other times you become serious... the more I know you, the more I fall for you. Let me introduce myself again. I am Prankster Mercury. I will serve at the Commander's side until the world ends.
1000659530.korean: 사령관은 본녀도 알기 힘든 분이세요. 어쩔 땐 소년처럼 웃고 떠드시다, 이럴 땐 다시&n진지하게 행동하시니... 알면 알수록 점점 빠져들게 돼요. 다시 한번 인사드리겠사와요.&n본녀, 프랭스터 머큐리. 세상이 끝날 때까지 사령관 곁에서 보필하겠사와요.

1000659531.english: Every warm, thoughtful word you always speak to me — do you know how great a salvation they are for me? That alone is more than I deserve, and then this... I won't ask if I may accept it. I've already decided to devote everything to you. ...Yes. To fulfill all of your wishes.
1000659531.korean: 언제나 제게 들려주는 따뜻하고 사려 깊은 말 한 마디, 한 마디가 제게 얼마나 큰 구원이 되는지...&n당신은 아시나요? 그것만으로도 과분한데, 이런 것까지... 받아도 될지 묻지는 않을게요.&n저는 이미, 당신을 위해 모든 것을 바치기로 했으니까요. ...네. 당신의 모든 소망을 이뤄주기 위해서요.

1000659532.english: I thought I had fumbled it, but as expected the Commander noticed right away... Maybe I secretly hoped you'd notice. I'm a woman too, after all; I've longed to be the heroine in a romance film who receives a confession from the one she loves. Thank you for making my wish come true, Commander. I... love you too.
1000659532.korean: 얼버무렸다고 생각했는데, 역시 사령관님은 금방 알아채시네요... 어쩌면 알아봐주시길 바란 걸지도&n모르겠어요. 저도 여자니까, 사랑하는 사람에게 고백 받는... 연애영화 속 주인공이 되길 기대해왔거든요.&n소원을 이뤄주셔서 감사해요, 사령관님. 저도... 사랑해요.

1000659533.english: Hmm... I thought it wouldn't concern me, but since the Commander is a man and I'm a woman, it's certainly possible. It's complicated to sort out logically, but to put it simply... I'm delighted. Here, my hand. Put it on yourself, Commander. ...So what should I do as a bride now? Should we mix our genes?
1000659533.korean: 흐음... 나랑은 상관없는 일일 줄 알았는데. 사령관이 남자고 내가 여자니까, 얼마든지 가능성은 있었네.&n논리적으로 정리하기 복잡하긴 한데, 한 마디로 비약하면... 기뻐. 자, 내 손. 사령관이 직접 끼워줘.&n...그럼 이제 신부로서 뭘 하면 좋을까. 유전자를 섞으면 돼?

1000659534.english: Sometimes I've thought about what would have become of me if I hadn't met my savior. The cool breeze, the glittering sunlight, and even this feeling... I would never have known them. Yes, the emotion you are feeling now, Saviour. ...From now on I'll call you my partner! Please favor that side more, and I too... my heart flutters.
1000659534.korean: 가끔 제가 구원자님을 만나지 못했다면 어떻게 됐을지 생각해 본 적 있어요. 불어오는 선선한 바람,&n반짝거리는 햇살, 그리고 이 마음까지... 알 수 없었을 거예요. 맞아요, 지금 구원자님이 느끼고 계신 감정이요.&n...앞으로 반려님! 이라고 부를게요. 그 편을 더 좋아해주시고, 저도 더... 두근거리니까요.

1000659535.english: This...! Since when have you had feelings for me? From the beginning... so you thought the same as I did. I too believed from the start that if there were someone to be my husband it would be the Admiral. Now, it's a festival! Let's hold it as grand and splendid as possible! Let's announce to the world the birth of the Queen and King of Choco Land!
1000659535.korean: 이건...! 언제부터 내게 연심을 품었던 거지? 처음부터라... 그렇다면 나와 같은 생각이었구나.&n나도 처음부터 내 낭군이 될 자가 있다면 제독밖에 없다고 여겼지. 자, 축제다!&n최대한 화려하게, 거창하게 여는 거다! 초코랜드의 여왕과 왕이 탄생한 걸 온 세상에 알리자!

1000659536.english: I'm a bit flustered. Boss, are you giving this to me? I don't dislike it... but my hobbies are so peculiar that I thought it would be hard to accept. But... that was all needless worry. Shall we go finish what we were doing before? The expression you made last time... I want to see it right now.
1000659536.korean: 조금 당황스러운데. 보스, 이거 나한테 주는 거 맞아? 싫은 건 아닌데... 내 취미가 워낙 독특하다 보니까,&n받아들여지기 어려울 거라 생각했거든. 그런데... 다 쓸데없는 고민이었네.&n이전에 하던 거, 마저 하러 갈까? 저번에 보스가 보여줬던 표정... 지금, 당장 보고 싶어졌어.

1000659537.english: The fortune said Hachiko of Castling's wish would come true this year, but I didn't expect it to happen so soon! Though it feels like I've used up the rest of my luck... Master will always be by my side, and that alone makes Hachiko of Castling of Castling lucky! As Master has made me happy, I will bring you lots of blessings too!
1000659537.korean: 점괘에서 올해 하치코 소원이 이뤄진다고 나왔는데, 이렇게 빨리 될 줄은 몰랐어요! 대신 남은 운을&n전부 써버린 것 같지만... 주인님이 늘 곁에 있어 주실 테니까, 그것만으로도 하치코는 행운아예요!&n주인님이 절 행복하게 만들어 주신 만큼 저도 복 많이 가져다드릴게요!

1000659538.english:
Huh? You’ve finally decided to join the cause too, big brother?”
“Good choice! I’ll issue your certificate right away—first, read the project overview.”
“I’ve already prepared your seat for you.”
“But before that…”
“Shall we finish our vow ceremony—something even more important than world domination?”
“Big brother, thanks for always going along with me.”
“I love you~
1000659538.korean: 응? 오빠도 드디어 대의에 함께할 생각이 든 거야? 잘 생각했어! 증명서는 바로 발급해 줄 테니까,&n일단 프로젝트 개요부터 읽어봐. 자리도 미리 준비해놨어. 음... 그래도 그전에...&n세계 정복보다도 더 중요한 서약식을 마무리해볼까? 오빠, 항상 나한테 맞춰줘서 고마워. 사랑해~

1000659541.english: -As the time to wake up was drawing near and my mind was slowly waking, I heard a sound.
1000659541.korean: - 기상 시간이 가까워졌는지 정신이 슬슬 깨어날 무렵, 어떤 소리를 들었다.

1000659543.english: -Is it CS Perrault who came to wake me today? It's been a while since it whined like this.
1000659543.korean: - 오늘 깨우러 온 건 페로인가. 이렇게 응석을 부리는 건 오랜만인데.

1000659544.english: -Since I still didn't want to leave the soft bed, I hugged CS Perrault and tried to sleep a little longer… but…?
1000659544.korean: - 아직 푹신한 침대에서 벗어나기 싫었던터라, 페로를 껴안으며 좀 더 자려고... 했는... 데...?

1000659545.english: -CS Perrault isn't that big, but was it really small enough to fit right into my arms like this…?
1000659545.korean: - 페로는 체구가 크지 않기는 하지만, 이렇게 품에 쏙 들어올 정도였던가...?

1000659546.english: -What greeted me As I leapt up like a bolt of lightning was…
1000659546.korean: - 벼락처럼 자리를 박차고 일어난 나를 맞이해 준 것은...

1000659548.english: -a creature I had never seen before.

1000659550.english: -...Judging from the cry and appearance, it seems to be a cat, but strangely it resembles CS Perrault…
1000659550.korean: - ...일단 울음 소리와 생김새를 보면 고양이인 것 같기는 한데, 묘하게 페로와 닮은 게...

1000659552.english: -I held in my arms the unidentified creature that tugged at my clothes while crying sorrowfully.
1000659552.korean: - 구슬프게 울며 내 옷을 잡아당기는 정체불명의 생물체를 품에 안았다.

1000659554.english: -Holding the unidentified creature that purred contentedly, I looked at the clock in dismay.
1000659554.korean: - 만족스럽게 갸르릉거리는 정체불명의 생물체를 품에 안고 황망히 시계를 바라봤다.

1000659555.english: -To check what on earth had happened, I got up and went out into the corridor.
1000659555.korean: - 대체 어떻게 된 일인지 확인하기 위해 몸을 일으켜 복도로 나갔다.

1000659557.english: -The corridor was quietly sinking into silence.

1000659558.english: -Normally, the Orca was full of life.

1000659559.english: -Members heading out and returning crossed paths, while those off-duty bustled in casual clothes to rest.
1000659559.korean: - 출격하는 대원들과 복귀하는 대원들이 교차하고, 비번인 대원들은 자유로운 옷차림으로 휴식을 취하기 위해 분주히 움직인다.

1000659560.english: -Karaoke, lounge, shop and other facilities were always crowded, and in the corridors you could always hear the crew's cheerful chatter.
1000659560.korean: - 노래방, 휴게실, 매점 등 편의시설은 항상 북적이고, 복도에서는 항상 대원들의 즐거운 이야깃소리가 들려온다.

1000659562.english: -Right now it was too quiet. As if… no one was there.
1000659562.korean: - 그러나 지금은 너무나 고요하다. 마치... 아무도 없는 것처럼.

1000659563.english: -I almost called out loudly to the crew, but a sudden wave of unease forced me to suppress my voice.
1000659563.korean: - 큰 소리로 대원들을 부르려다 별안간 찾아온 불안감에 억지로 목소리를 눌렀다.

1000659564.english: -Somehow, I had a feeling that I mustn't do that.
1000659564.korean: - 어쩐지, 그래서는 안 될 것 같은 예감이 든다.

1000659565.english: -Drawing from my holster the "Commander's Self-Defense Pistol Mk.217," modified by Azaz, I moved slowly, on guard in all directions.
1000659565.korean: - 홀스터에서 아자즈가 개조해준, '사령관님 호신용 권총 Mk.217'을 뽑아들고 사주를 경계하며 천천히 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000659567.english: -The strange creature that had been quietly nestled… no, since it resembled CS Perrault…
1000659567.korean: - 얌전히 안겨 있던 괴생물체... 아니, 페로를 닮았으니까...

1000659568.english: -The Mini CS Perrault that had been quietly nestled suddenly let out a cry.
1000659568.korean: - 얌전히 안겨 있던 미니 페로가 별안간 울음 소리를 냈다.

1000659571.english: -At my desperate attempt to soothe it, Mini CS Perrault finally quieted down.
1000659571.korean: - 내 필사적인 달래기에 미니 페로는 간신히 조용해졌다.

1000659572.english: -From the corridor, once again sunk in silence… a strange sound could be heard.
1000659572.korean: - 다시 정적이 내려앉은 복도에서... 묘한 소리가 들렸다.

1000659573.english: -The sound of light, quick footsteps—dododo, dadada—made me turn my head.
1000659573.korean: - 도도도, 다다다 하는, 작고 가벼운 발소리에 뒤를 돌아보았다.

1000659574.english: -When I finally spotted familiar faces and took a step forward, I realized something was wrong.
1000659574.korean: - 마침내 익숙한 얼굴들을 발견하고 한 걸음을 내딛었을 때, 무언가 이상하다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000659575.english: -Even accounting for distance, our crew members appeared unusually small in size, yet even while I was still in confusion, they steadily closed the gap with their little dododo steps…
1000659575.korean: - 원근을 감안해도 상당히 작은 크기로 보이는 우리 대원들은 내가 혼란에 빠져 있는 와중에도 착실히 도도도 거리를 좁혀왔고...

1000659578.english: -Instinctively, I spun around and ran at full speed.

1000659579.english: -Individually, they looked cute, but the way they flooded the corridor with a wave-like force was nothing short of violence.
1000659579.korean: - 분명 하나하나는 귀엽게 생겼지만, 복도를 가득 메우고 들이닥치는 해일과 같은 기세는 폭력 외에 그 무엇도 아니었다.

1000659580.english: -As I ran with all my strength, I checked the rooms along the corridor, but all of them were empty.
1000659580.korean: - 온 힘을 다해 달리며 복도의 방들을 확인했지만, 전부 비어있었다.

1000659581.english: -No, strictly speaking, not all of them were empty.

1000659582.english: -Because from those rooms too, unidentified creatures began pouring out.
1000659582.korean: - 그 방들에서도, 곧 정체불명의 생물체들이 쏟아져 나오기 시작했으니까.

1000659584.english: What are you doing, meow! Over there, meow!

1000659585.english: -The auditory information that entered my ears didn't even make it to my brain before my legs reacted first and turned.
1000659585.korean: - 귀로 들어온 청각 정보가 뇌를 거칠 세도 없이, 다리가 먼저 반응해 방향을 꺾는다.

1000659587.english: Go down and to the left, meow!

1000659589.english: -How long had I been running? In a complete panic, I barely managed to hide myself inside a room I didn't recognize.
1000659589.korean: - 얼마나 달렸을까. 완전히 패닉인 상태로, 어디인지 모를 방에 간신히 몸을 숨길 수 있었다.

1000659590.english: -Pressing my ear against the crack of the door, I tried to calm my pounding heart.
1000659590.korean: - 터질듯이 뛰는 심장을 진정 시키며 문틈에 귀를 가져다 댔다.

1000659597.english: -With Mini CS Perrault tilting its head as if asking what I was saying, I held it in my arms and groped around for the light switch.
1000659597.korean: - 무슨 말을 하냐는듯 고개를 갸웃하는 미니 페로를 품 안에 안고 손을 더듬어 조명 스위치를 찾았다.

1000659598.english: -I knew the structure of the Orca by heart, enough to walk it blindfolded, but I had no memory of a room like this.
1000659598.korean: - 오르카 호의 구조는 눈 감고도 돌아다닐 수 있을 정도로 완전히 꿰고 있었지만, 이런 방은 기억에 없다.

1000659599.english: -At that moment, I heard someone's voice from inside.
1000659599.korean: - 그 때, 안쪽에서 누군가의 목소리가 들렸다.

1000659602.english: Heh heh, yes. I am the Doctor!

1000659603.english: The great and magnificent villain, Dr. Doctorman! Some even call me "Professor."
1000659603.korean: 위대하고 훌륭한 악당, Dr.닥터맨이다! 세간에는 '프로페서'라고도 알려져있지.

1000659604.english: But who are you! A new graduate student?

1000659605.english: It is Dr. Doctorman! Mind the title!

1000659608.english: -The Mini CS Perrault in my arms suddenly unsheathed its claws and lunged at Doctor… Doctorman.
1000659608.korean: - 품에 안겨있던 미니 페로는 갑자기 발톱을 세우곤, 닥터... 닥터맨에게 달려들었다.

1000659612.english: What's this, already friends? You seem to have talent.
1000659612.korean: 뭐야, 그새 친해진 건가. 재능이 있어 보이는군.

1000659613.english: You, come work in my lab. If you finish the project, I'll grant you a degree.
1000659613.korean: 너, 내 연구실에서 일해라. 프로젝트를 완료하면 학위를 주지.

1000659614.english: If you achieve results in the field of biotechnology, I'll count your results triple.
1000659614.korean: 만약 생명공학 부분에서 성과를 낸다면, 성과를 세 배로 인정해 주겠다.

1000659616.english: You won't be human anymore, meow!

1000659621.english: So… after that, I, wearing some strange mask, and a shrunken CS Perrault-Big Sis…
1000659621.korean: 그러니까... 그 다음에 이상한 가면을 쓴 나랑, 작아진 페로 언니랑...

1000659622.english: We got into a heated debate about ensuring a wholesome research environment and world domination, right?
1000659622.korean: 건전한 연구 환경 보장과 세계 정복에 대해 격렬한 토론을 벌였다는 거지?

1000659623.english: -…Hearing it summarized like this, it really does sound insane.

1000659624.english: Hmm, if we think about your dream from a psychoanalytical perspective, that would mean…
1000659624.korean: 흐음, 오빠의 꿈을 정신분석학적으로 생각해봤을 때, 그건...

1000659625.english: -I gulped, staring at Doctor's serious face.
1000659625.korean: - 진지한 얼굴을 한 닥터를 보며 꿀꺽 침을 삼켰다.

1000659626.english: Heehee, it's just a nonsense dream.

1000659627.english: Yeah. More precisely, just an ordinary dream with nothing special to it.
1000659627.korean: 응. 정확히는 별다를 것도 없는 평범한 꿈이라는 뜻.

1000659628.english: Mhm. Of course, from the listener's point of view, it's an incredibly funny dream.
1000659628.korean: 응응. 물론 듣는 사람 입장에서 무지하게 재밌는 꿈이긴 하지만.

1000659629.english: I really had to hold back my laughter~ Using shrunken sisters to conquer the world—what kind of villain does that? It's way too cute!
1000659629.korean: 웃음 참느라 힘들었다구~ 작아진 언니들을 이용해서 세계 정복이라니. 악당 치고 너무 귀여운 거 아니야?

1000659631.english: Ah, right. Anyway, your regular checkup's coming up soon, so should we just do it a little earlier?
1000659631.korean: 아, 그래. 어차피 오빠 정기 검사일 얼마 안남았으니까 조금 일찍할까?

1000659632.english: It'll be fine~ Come on, let's go.

1000659636.english: Mmm… I'll get up when the alarm rings…

1000659641.english: Ah, do you want to be held?

1000659643.english: Cute, but... no matter how I look at it, this isn't normal.
1000659643.korean: 귀엽긴 하지만... 아무리 봐도 정상은 아니군.

1000659652.english: Why do they all look kind of small...?
1000659652.korean: 어째 다들 좀 작은 것 같은데...?

1000659659.english: Hah, hahh... what the hell is this...

1000659661.english: Yeah, yeah. You're on my side, huh...

1000659662.english: ...But wait, didn't you just speak human words earlier?
1000659662.korean: ...근데 너, 아까 사람 말 하지 않았니?

1000659663.english: By the way, this room is...

1000659665.english: Thank goodness, outside it's a total cha—

1000659674.english: Haa... well, if that's the case, thank goodness.

1000659675.english: D-do you think so? Still feels unsettling...

1000659677.english: Master, was the empty slot in today's schedule because of this? Ah...! I-I'm not refusing. This was completely unplanned... If you truly chose me... I will have to revise my future schedule completely. And... now that Master is mine, I'll write my name down so you don't lose me.
1000659677.korean: 주인님, 오늘 계획표에 비어있던 부분이 이것 때문이었습니까? 앗...! 거, 거절하는 게 아닙니다.&n전혀 예정에 없던 일이라... 정말 절 선택해 주신 거라면... 미래 계획표를 전면 수정해야겠군요.&n그리고... 주인님도 이제 제게 됐으니까, 잃어버리지 않게 제 이름을 적어 두겠습니다.​

1000659678.english: I've imagined the moment of being loved many times while reading ten thousand romance comics. But when that moment actually came... reality is completely different from my imagination. Reality is... so much better! It's the best! Thrilling! Reality is the best! Ehehehe! Please take care of me going forward, Commander!
1000659678.korean: 1만 권의 연애 만화를 보면서 누군가에게 사랑받는 순간을 많이 상상해왔어요.&n그런데 정작 그 순간이 오니... 현실은 상상과 전혀 다르네요. 현실은... 훨씬 좋은 거 있죠!&n최고야! 짜릿해! 현실이 최고야! 에헤헤헤! 앞으로도 잘 부탁드려요, 사령관님!

1000659679.english: Rings... if you put two together like this they look like the infinity symbol, right? People usually describe the universe as infinite. In reality it's unimaginably huge and expands faster than light. But there is something that is truly infinite in this world. My feeling for my captain. I, Spartoia, love the captain more than the universe!
1000659679.korean: 반지... 두 개를 이렇게 붙이면 무한 표시로 보이지? 보통 우주를 무한하다고 표현하잖아.&n실제로는 어마어마하게 크고 광속 이상으로 팽창하는 거지만. 하지만 세상에는 실제로 무한한 게 있어.&n나의 대장에 대한 마음. 나 스파토이아는 대장을 우주보다 사랑해!

1000659682.english: -At my question, Kaen silently handed me something.
1000659682.korean: - 내 질문에 카엔은 말 없이 무언가를 건넸다.

1000659684.korean: - 점심 먹은 지 얼마 안 됐는데...

1000659686.english: -When I hesitated, Kaen's expression visibly sank.
1000659686.korean: - 내가 주저하자 카엔은 눈에 띄게 의기소침해졌다.

1000659687.english: -Even so, the sushi Kaen made actually looked delicious.
1000659687.korean: - 그렇게 얼버무렸지만 실제로 카엔이 만든 초밥은 맛있어 보였다.

1000659688.english: -And it probably was. At least when it comes to sushi-making, Kaen's skill rivals Sowan's.
1000659688.korean: - 그리고 실제로도 맛있겠지. 다른 음식은 몰라도 카엔의 초밥 만드는 솜씨는 소완과 비견되니까.

1000659690.english: -I picked up the sushi on the far left, topped with white fish.
1000659690.korean: - 나는 우선 가장 왼쪽에 있는 흰살생선을 얹은 초밥을 집어들었다.

1000659691.english: -Then I dipped it lightly in soy sauce and took a bite.
1000659691.korean: - 그리고 간장을 살짝 찍은 후에 한 입에.

1000659692.english: -The unexpected taste almost made me spit it out.
1000659692.korean: - 예상 외의 맛에 뱉을 뻔한 것을 간신히 참았다.

1000659693.english: -It didn't taste like the sushi I was expecting.
1000659693.korean: - 초밥에선 내가 기대한 맛이 나지 않았다.

1000659694.english: - At first glance, it looked like sushi, but once I tasted it, it was clear that the ingredients included things like jelly, candy, jam, and chocolate.
1000659694.korean: - 겉보기에는 초밥이지만 맛을 보면 재료에 젤리, 사탕, 잼, 초콜릿 같은 게 들어 간 게 분명했다.

1000659696.english: - How could I possibly refuse when it comes from the heart?
1000659696.korean: - 마음이라는데 이를 어떻게 거절할 수 있을까.

1000659697.english: - I steeled myself and finished eating the remaining sushi.
1000659697.korean: - 나는 각오를 다지고 남은 초밥을 마저 먹었다.

1000659698.english: Shrimp sushi... marinated in orange juice instead of soy sauce.
1000659698.korean: 간장 대신... 오렌지 주스에 절인, 새우 초밥.

1000659699.english: - The sweet and tangy taste of orange juice made for an excellent sushi that completely killed my appetite.
1000659699.korean: - 오렌지 주스의 새콤달콤한 맛이 입맛을 뚝 떨어트리는 훌륭한 초밥이었다.

1000659700.english: Seared tuna tataki... topped with candy powder.

1000659701.english: - The sweet candy and fatty tuna combined into a taste that clogged my arteries completely.
1000659701.korean: - 달콤한 사탕과 기름진 참치의 맛에 혈관이 꽉꽉 막는 맛이었다.

1000659703.english: - Rather than flavor harmony, it was a sushi where I had to struggle to keep the pudding from sliding off the rice.
1000659703.korean: - 맛의 조화는 둘째치고 밥 위에 올라간 푸딩이 떨어지지 않게 노력해야하는 초밥이었다.

1000659705.english: - It was a perfect finishing blow that dealt the final strike to my stomach, already groggy.
1000659705.korean: - 그로기 상태에 빠진 위장에 마지막 일격을 가하는 훌륭한 마무리였다.

1000659706.english: - That was my impression, but overall it wasn't food I couldn't eat.
1000659706.korean: - 감상평은 이랬지만 전체적으로 못 먹을 음식은 아니었다.

1000659707.english: - Not food I couldn't eat, but... if Sowan were to find out...
1000659707.korean: - 못 먹을 음식은 아니지만...만약 소완이 알게 되면...

1000659708.english: Since you seem not to know the heart of ingredients...

1000659709.english: should you not first become an ingredient yourself, and learn their sorrow?
1000659709.korean: 먼저 식재료가 되어 그 비통한 마음을 알아보시지 않겠사옵니까?

1000659710.english: - I could clearly see Sowan, awakened as the incarnation of ingredients, going around hunting down the culprit.
1000659710.korean: - 식재료의 화신으로 각성한 소완이 원수를 찾아다닐 모습이 훤히 보였다.

1000659711.english: - For the peace of Orca's kitchen, I ate it all.
1000659711.korean: - 오르카 호 주방의 평화를 위해서 완식했다.

1000659715.english: - Kaen took the empty sushi plate and left my room.
1000659715.korean: - 카엔은 빈 초밥 그릇을 가지고 내 방을 나섰다.

1000659716.english: - A sense of disappointment radiated from her back.
1000659716.korean: - 그녀의 뒷모습에서 실망했다는 기운이 흘러나오고 있었다.

1000659718.english: And then sushi appeared on the menu for dinner that day.
1000659718.korean: 그리고 오늘 저녁 메뉴로 초밥이 나왔다.

1000659719.english: We got excellent fish in today, so I decided to put my skills to use.

1000659720.english: - Sowan presented the sushi in a flat tone, but one that carried pride.
1000659720.korean: - 소완은 무덤덤하게, 하지만 자부심이 느껴지는 말투로 초밥을 대령했다.

1000659722.english: - When I carelessly said that, Sowan pouted.

1000659723.english: - Because I ate all the sushi to comfort the sulking Sowan, I ended up with indigestion. Ugh!
1000659723.korean: - 삐진 소완을 달래기 위해 초밥을 다 먹은 덕분에 체했다. 욱!

1000659727.english: - When I nodded, Kaen took the lead and guided me.
1000659727.korean: - 내가 고개를 끄덕이자 카엔은 앞장서서 나를 인도했다.

1000659728.english: - As Kaen said, the destination was a small room not far away.
1000659728.korean: - 카엔의 말대로 얼마 떨어지지 않은 작은 방이 목적지였다.

1000659730.english: - The room was narrow, with no light other than a candle in the center.
1000659730.korean: - 방은 좁았고, 가운데에 있는 촛불 외에는 조명이 없었다.

1000659731.english: - And beside the candle was a blanket.

1000659732.english: - This atmosphere... no matter how you looked at it...

1000659733.english: - I didn't dislike it, but I tried joking.

1000659737.english: - Only then did I notice the room was filled with all sorts of fragrant scents.
1000659737.korean: - 나는 뒤늦게 방 안이 온갖 향긋한 향이 가득하다는 것을 알아챘다.

1000659739.english: - Kaen closed the door, sat in front of the candle, then gestured to the opposite side.
1000659739.korean: - 카엔은 방문을 닫고 촛불 앞에 앉은 후 반대편을 손으로 가리켰다.

1000659742.english: - Kaen said that and pointed to the blanket next to me.
1000659742.korean: - 카엔은 그렇게 말하고 옆에 있는 이불을 가리켰다.

1000659743.english: The sunlight was nice. Scent. Good.

1000659744.english: - When I lay down on the blanket, the smell of sun-dried bedding wrapped around me.
1000659744.korean: - 이불에 누우니 햇볕에 잘 말린 이불의 냄새가 나를 감쌌다.

1000659745.english: - As I lay down, Kaen handed me a bouquet.
1000659745.korean: - 내가 이불에 눕자 카엔은 꽃다발을 나에게 건넸다.

1000659749.english: - Kaen then handed me another bouquet.

1000659751.english: Lily Bloommerchen. Red rose. Hibiscus. Lilac. Tulip. Lisianthus. Sunflower. Calla.
1000659751.korean: 백합. 붉은 장미. 히비스커스. 라일락. 튤립. 리시안사스. 해바라기. 카라.

1000659752.english: - Kaen gave me the bouquets one by one, telling me the names of the flowers.
1000659752.korean: - 카엔은 나에게 꽃다발을 하나씩 주면서 꽃의 이름을 알려주었다.

1000659753.english: - Among them were flowers I already knew.
1000659753.korean: - 개중에는 내가 알고 있는 꽃도 있었다.

1000659757.english: - Kaen picked up the candle and lit the other candles beside it.
1000659757.korean: - 카엔은 촛불을 들어 옆에 있는 다른 초에도 불을 붙였다.

1000659758.english: - She didn't stop there, taking out an incense burner and placing incense in it.
1000659758.korean: - 카엔은 거기서 멈추지 않고 향로를 꺼내 향을 꽂았다.

1000659759.english: - Before I knew it, the room was filled with a dense fragrance.
1000659759.korean: - 어느새 방 안은 진득한 향기로 가득 찼다.

1000659760.english: - It was so thick it felt as if only my sense of smell remained alive among the five senses.
1000659760.korean: - 오감 중 오직 후각만이 살아 있는 것처럼 느껴질 정도로 진한 향이었다.

1000659762.english: - I stroked the bouquet of rapeseed flowers in my arms.
1000659762.korean: - 나는 내 품에 있는 유채꽃다발을 쓰다듬었다.

1000659763.english: - The scent itself was hard to call pleasant... but rapeseed flowers carried a special meaning.
1000659763.korean: - 향 자체는 좋다고 말하기 힘들지만... 유채꽃에는 특별한 의미가 있었다.

1000659765.english: - And the other bouquets as well.

1000659766.english: - Dahlia, Lily Bloommerchen. Red rose. Hibiscus. Lilac. Tulip. Lisianthus. Sunflower. Calla...
1000659766.korean: - 달리아, 백합. 붉은 장미. 히비스커스. 라일락. 튤립. 리시안사스. 해바라기. 카라...

1000659767.english: - All flowers with meanings tied to love.
1000659767.korean: - 전부 애정과 관련된 꽃말을 가진 꽃들.

1000659768.english: - The meaning of rapeseed flowers and the language of the others connected in my mind.
1000659768.korean: - 유채꽃의 의미와 다른 꽃들의 꽃말이 머릿속에서 연결되었다.

1000659770.english: - But why go so far as to use this method?
1000659770.korean: - 하지만 어째서 왜 구태여 이런 방식을 쓰는걸까?

1000659772.english: - I racked my brain to express both my doubts and an answer to Kaen's question.
1000659772.korean: - 나는 의문과 카엔의 질문에 대한 답을 표현하기 위해 머리를 굴렸다.

1000659773.english: - But my head, intoxicated by the heavy fragrance, couldn't come up with proper words.
1000659773.korean: - 그러나 진한 향기에 취한 머리는 제대로 된 단어를 떠올리지 못했다.

1000659776.english: - Filling the cramped room with burning candles and incense quickly choked it with smoke.
1000659776.korean: - 좁은 공간에 향초와 향로를 잔뜩 태우니 순식간에 연기가 가득 찼다.

1000659777.english: - Soon, alarms went off and the sprinkler system activated.

1000659778.english: - Soaked in water, we escaped the room.
1000659778.korean: - 우리는 물에 잔뜩 젖은 채로 방을 탈출했다.

1000659782.english: - Kaen trudged back to her room.

1000659783.english: - After she left, I thought again about what she had been trying to tell me.
1000659783.korean: - 카엔이 떠나고 나서 나는 다시 카엔이 나에게 무엇을 전하려고 하는지 생각해보았다.

1000659785.english: - But why go to such troublesome lengths?
1000659785.korean: - 하지만 왜 이런 번거로운 방법을 쓰지?

1000659787.english: - Serapias Alice was the first to rush over when she heard the alarm.
1000659787.korean: - 알람을 듣고 앨리스가 제일 먼저 달려왔다.

1000659789.english: - At my answer, Serapias Alice let out a sigh of relief and examined the room I had just been in.
1000659789.korean: - 내 대답에 앨리스는 안도의 한숨을 내쉬고 내가 방금 전까지 있던 방을 살폈다.

1000659790.english: Did you... play with fire, perhaps?

1000659792.english: I'll take you to a safe place right now.

1000659793.english: - Other crew members soon gathered after hearing the alarm.

1000659794.english: - When they realized the cause wasn't serious and that I was unharmed, they too let out sighs of relief.
1000659794.korean: - 대원들은 알람이 울린 이유가 별 거 아니고 내가 무사하다는 것을 알자 안도의 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000659796.english: Master... if you wish to be scolded, you only have to tell me that you want to be...
1000659796.korean: 주인님... 혼나고 싶으시면 혼나고 싶다고 저에게 말씀하시면 되는데...

1000659797.english: I knew Master liked to play with fire, but I thought that fire-play was only the fire of the night.
1000659797.korean: 주인님께서 불장난을 좋아하는 것은 알고 있었지만, 그 불장난은 어디까지나 밤의 불장난으로 알고 있었습니다.

1000659798.english: But to think you also enjoy this kind of childish fire-play, this is the first I've learned of it.
1000659798.korean: 그런데 이런 유치한 불장난까지 좋아한다는 것은 처음 알게 되는군요.

1000659799.english: Or perhaps you wished for a humiliation play where, after playing with fire, you wet the bed, wore a pot on your head, and went around begging for salt?
1000659799.korean: 아니면 불장난 후에 이불에 지도를 그리고 머리에 키를 쓰고 소금을 얻으러 다니는 수치플레이를 하시길 바라신겁니까?

1000659800.english: Please, I beg you. Take care of yourself. If you were to get hurt, Master, I would be so sad I couldn't bear it.
1000659800.korean: 제발 부탁드려요. 자신을 소중히 해주세요. 주인님께서 다치시기라도 하면 저는 슬퍼서 견딜 수 없을거예요.

1000659801.english: - I was scolded in all sorts of messy ways.

1000659802.english: - I did feel it was a bit unfair, but I didn't bring up Kaen's name because I wanted to be sure of her feelings.
1000659802.korean: - 억울한 면이 없잖아 있었지만 카엔의 마음을 확실히 알기 위해서 카엔의 이름을 꺼내지는 않았다.

1000659803.english: - While walking around the Orca, wild Neodym, X-05 Emily, and Kaen appeared.
1000659803.korean: - 오르카 호를 거닐고 있으니 야생의 네오딤, 에밀리, 카엔이 나타났다.

1000659806.english: - As soon as Kaen finished speaking, Neodym shook her maracas, and X-05 Emily struck a triangle.
1000659806.korean: - 카엔의 말이 끝나자마자 네오딤이 마라카스를 흔들고, 에밀리가 트라이앵글을 치기 시작했다.

1000659808.english: - And then Kaen began to perform a series of incomprehensible movements.
1000659808.korean: - 그리고 카엔이 알 수 없는 일련의 동작을 보여주기 시작했다.

1000659809.english: - They weren't the fierce, acrobatic movements she used in combat or performance, but simple, easy motions.
1000659809.korean: - 전투나 연기를 할 때의 격렬하고 아크로바틱한 동작이 아닌 단순하고 쉬운 동작들이었다.

1000659810.english: - Yet Kaen carried them out seriously and solemnly, like a priestess dancing to praise a god.
1000659810.korean: - 그러나 카엔은 진지하고 엄숙하게 일련의 동작을 이어갔다. 마치 신을 찬양하는 춤을 추는 제사장처럼.

1000659812.english: - After dancing for a while, Kaen let out a faint sigh and finished her dance.
1000659812.korean: - 한참 동안 춤을 춘 카엔은 나지막한 한숨을 쉰 후에 춤을 마쳤다.

1000659815.english: - After what happened last time, the answer had already come to mind. But I couldn't be certain.
1000659815.korean: - 지난 번의 일도 있어 머릿속으로 떠오른 답은 있었다. 하지만 확신을 가지지 못했다.

1000659816.english: - So I could only answer like this.
1000659816.korean: - 그래서 나는 이렇게 답할 수밖에 없었다.

1000659818.english: - At my response, Kaen simply nodded silently and left.
1000659818.korean: - 내 대답에 카엔은 말 없이 고개만 끄덕이고 자리를 떠났다.

1000659820.english: Maybe... I should have brought castanets?

1000659824.english: - Neodym snapped like that and followed after the two.
1000659824.korean: - 네오딤은 그렇게 쏘아붙이고 두 사람의 뒤를 따랐다.

1000659828.english: Teacher said failure is the mother of success.

1000659829.english: They said once a secret point is discovered, analyze the discoverer's behavioral patterns and pioneer a new place.
1000659829.korean: 한 번 시크릿 포인트를 들키면 발견자의 행동 양식을 분석해서 새로운 장소를 개척하면 된다고 했어.

1000659830.english: First, let's find out why the operations failed.

1000659832.english: First, the operation of expressing feelings through food.

1000659834.english: I put lots of jelly... and chocolate... and juice... into sushi.

1000659835.english: Master... ate it all but... said it was creative.

1000659836.english: Maybe it was too advanced for the Commander to understand.

1000659837.english: Next, Kaen's heart... expressed with fragrance.

1000659840.english: Commander is kind... that's why... I like him.

1000659844.english: It was imitating the courtship dance of animals. He didn't notice.
1000659844.korean: 동물들의 구애의 춤을 따라한 건데. 못 알아챘어.

1000659846.english: Maybe... I should have sung a song... too?

1000659848.english: Neodym went to the village. She rode a donkey, stuck a piece of iron in her hat, and called herself Macaroni.
1000659848.korean: 네오딤이 마을에 갔네. 당나귀를 타고 모자에 철을 꼽고 마카로니라 불렀네

1000659849.english: Then... next time... express your heart through a song?

1000659851.english: T-2 Brownie said when singing, what matters isn't singing well or badly, but how much heart you put into it.
1000659851.korean: 브라우니가 노래를 부를 때 중요한 것은 잘 부르고 못 부르고가 아니라 얼마나 마음이 담겨 있느냐라고 했어.

1000659854.english: Singing too... can't do it properly.

1000659859.english: Did you think of something good?

1000659861.english: If you write slowly... with a letter... wouldn't you be able to express your heart properly?
1000659861.korean: 천천히...편지 쓰면...제대로 마음을...표현 할 수 있지 않을까?

1000659862.english: Once it's written, let's ask Constancha... to check it.

1000659864.english: Here. As a reward, I'll give you my share of candy.
1000659864.korean: 자. 상으로 내 몫의 사탕 줄게.

1000659871.english: Kaen's letter... doesn't want... others to see.
1000659871.korean: 카엔 편지... 다른 사람이... 안 보길 원해.

1000659873.english: Kaen. Not being able to speak. Congenital.

1000659876.english: If I write a letter... I'll always need someone else's help.
1000659876.korean: 편지 쓰면... 계속 다른 사람, 도움 필요해.

1000659877.english: And each time... someone other than Master will know Kaen's heart first.
1000659877.korean: 그럴 때마다... 주공 아닌 사람이 먼저, 카엔 마음 알게 돼.

1000659879.english: So... Kaen will make her own way.

1000659886.english: Mm... I don't really know... what to say but...

1000659889.english: Kaen. Going to... write a letter...

1000659890.english: -When I had finished the day's work and was getting ready for bed, Kaen came to my room.
1000659890.korean: - 일과를 마치고 잘 준비를 하고 있을 때 카엔이 내 방을 찾았다.

1000659897.english: -In the letter, though the handwriting was elegant, the composition was a mess.
1000659897.korean: - 편지에는 달필이지만 문체는 엉망인 글이 나열되어 있었다.

1000659898.english: - The letter explained what her recent behavior meant.
1000659898.korean: - 편지에는 최근 그녀가 보여준 일련의 행동이 무엇을 의미하는지 설명되어 있었다.

1000659899.english: First, Kaen apologizes for her strange writing.
1000659899.korean: 우선 카엔의 글 이상한 거 사과해.

1000659901.english: So her speech is strange. Her writing is the same.

1000659902.english: But Kaen's emotion module is not broken.

1000659903.english: When Kaen sees Master, emotions overflow.

1000659904.english: They overflow, but she cannot express them properly.

1000659905.english: Unspoken feelings pile up in her chest.
1000659905.korean: 전하지 못한 감정들이 가슴 잔뜩 고여.

1000659906.english: Her chest feels so tight it might burst.

1000659907.english: She tried to convey them somehow. Somehow.

1000659908.english: She tried to express with cooking.

1000659909.english: She tried to express with scent.

1000659910.english: She tried to express with dance.

1000659912.english: Kaen knows. The letter will not be conveyed properly either.
1000659912.korean: 카엔 알아. 편지도 제대로 전달 안돼.

1000659913.english: But she still wants to tell you.

1000659914.english: -Through the letter, Kaen's actions, which I had only guessed at until now, one by one began to make sense.
1000659914.korean: - 편지를 통해 짐작하고만 있던 카엔의 행동이 하나씩 납득이 되었다.

1000659915.english: -Serving strange-tasting dishes, filling a cramped space with incense, and performing incomprehensible dances before me.
1000659915.korean: - 이상한 맛의 요리를 먹이고, 좁은 곳에서 향을 피우고, 내 앞에서 알 수 없는 춤을 추었던 것.

1000659916.english: -At the time, I couldn't understand, and wondered if it might be, but now I knew.
1000659916.korean: - 그 때는 이해하지 못했고, 혹시나 싶었지만 지금은 알게 되었다.

1000659917.english: -She was always serious. She put her whole heart into expressing herself.
1000659917.korean: - 그녀는 언제나 진지했다. 전심전력으로 자신을 표현했다.

1000659918.english: -To express her feelings. To express only one feeling. To express what was contained in the final sentence of her letter.
1000659918.korean: - 자신의 마음을 표현하기 위해서. 단 하나의 마음을 표현하기 위해서. 그녀의 편지 가장 마지막 문장에 담긴 마음을 표현하기 위해서.

1000659921.english: -Her words, strung together imperfectly, failing to form proper sentences, conveyed her heart more desperately than a hundred or a thousand words of eloquence.
1000659921.korean: - 그녀의 이상으로 제대로 문장으로 엮이지 못한 단어의 나열은 백마디 천마디의 달변보다 절실하게 그녀의 마음을 담고 있었다.

1000659922.english: - Of course, even that confession containing the essence of her heart could hardly be said to fully express all the feelings left inside her.
1000659922.korean: - 물론 마음의 정수가 담긴 그 고백조차도 그녀 안에 남은 감정을 온전히 표현했다고 하기 힘들 것이다.

1000659923.english: - And yet her heart reached me. It seeped into me, into my chest, into my soul.
1000659923.korean: - 그럼에도 그녀의 마음은 나에게 닿아. 내 안에, 가슴에, 마음에 스며들어.

1000659924.english: - It filled the vessel that is me with love for Kaen until it overflowed.
1000659924.korean: - 나라는 그릇 안을 카엔에 대한 애정으로 가득 채우고도 넘치게 만들었다.

1000659926.english: - I opened my arms toward Kaen.
1000659926.korean: - 나는 카엔을 향해 두 팔을 벌렸다.

1000659927.english: - As I opened my arms, Kaen slowly approached and embraced me.
1000659927.korean: - 내가 두 팔을 벌리자 카엔은 천천히 나에게 다가와 나를 안았다.

1000659930.english: - Kaen took my hand and rubbed her cheek against it. The soft sensation filled my palm completely.
1000659930.korean: - 카엔은 내 손을 펼치고 거기에 자신의 볼을 문질렀다. 부드러운 감촉이 내 손바닥을 가득 채웠다.

1000659931.english: - As much as I savored her, Kaen was savoring me as well.
1000659931.korean: - 내가 그녀를 만끽하는 만큼 카엔도 나를 만끽하고 있었다.

1000659933.english: - Rubbing her cheek against my palm, Kaen met my gaze, gave a light laugh, and wrapped her arms around my neck.
1000659933.korean: - 손바닥에 볼을 문지르던 카엔은 나와 눈이 마주치자 가볍게 웃고는 내 목에 팔을 둘렀다.

1000659935.english: - Kaen's face gradually filled my vision until it filled my whole world.
1000659935.korean: - 카엔의 얼굴이 점점 내 시야를 가득 채우더니 곧 내 세상을 가득 채웠다.

1000659937.english: - My world was filled with Kaen, and so was my heart.
1000659937.korean: - 나의 세상에는 카엔이 가득했고, 내 안도 마찬가지였다.

1000659938.english: - After a kiss that felt both short and long, Kaen's face pulled away from mine.
1000659938.korean: - 짧고도 긴 입맞춤이 끝나고 카엔의 얼굴의 나에게서 멀어졌다.

1000659939.english: - With a dazed expression, Kaen placed her hand on her chest and spoke.
1000659939.korean: - 카엔은 멍한 표정으로 자신의 가슴에 손을 얹고 말했다.

1000659941.english: I expressed... my emotions to the fullest. Yet, it's not enough.

1000659942.english: Beyond what I expressed... emotions overflow.

1000659943.english: - I expressed the overflowing feelings in my heart.
1000659943.korean: - 나는 내 가슴에 넘치는 감정을 표현했다.

1000659945.english: - In response to my confession, Kaen expressed her emotions with her whole body.
1000659945.korean: - 내 고백에 카엔은 온 몸으로 자신의 감정을 표현했다.

1000659946.english: - Her body was hot, the warmth radiating a fragrant scent. Her eyes brimmed with affection for me, and from her chest pressed against mine I could feel her heart beating wildly.
1000659946.korean: - 그녀의 몸은 뜨거웠고, 달아오른 몸에서 향긋한 냄새가 풍겼다. 그녀의 두 눈에는 나를 향한 애정이 가득했고, 맞닿은 가슴에선 그녀의 심장이 크게 뛰는 것이 느껴졌다.

1000659948.english: Master loves Kaen, and Kaen loves Master.

1000659949.english: I'll tell you my name. If you love, telling your name is the rule.
1000659949.korean: 이름, 알려줄게. 사랑하면, 이름 알려주는 게 규칙.

1000659950.english: Kaen's name is Hatsuna. It means rapeseed flower.

1000659952.english: – When I called her name, she gave a radiant smile as if a flower had bloomed.
1000659952.korean: - 내가 그녀의 이름을 부르자 그녀는 꽃이 피어나는 것처럼 화려한 미소를 지었다.

1000659954.english: – After that, we stayed up all night together to convey our hearts to one another.
1000659954.korean: - 그 이후 우리는 상대에게 자신의 마음을 전하기위해 함께 밤을 새웠다.

1000659956.english: – When I woke in the morning, Kaen was lying beside me, gazing at me.
1000659956.korean: - 아침에 일어나니 카엔이 내 옆에 누워 나를 바라보고 있었다.

1000659958.english: – When I called her, Kaen only puffed her cheeks without answering.
1000659958.korean: - 내가 부르자 카엔은 볼을 부풀리기만 할 뿐 대답을 하지 않았다.

1000659959.english: – The reason was... no doubt... this, wasn't it?

1000659961.english: – The ancient humans, for their own greed, had stripped her of the ability to speak language.
1000659961.korean: - 옛 인류는 자신들의 욕심을 위해서 그녀에게서 언어를 구사하는 능력을 빼앗았다.

1000659962.english: – Though she felt inconvenience from her deficiency, she never called it unhappiness nor did she despair.
1000659962.korean: - 그녀는 자신의 부족함에 불편함을 느끼기는 했지만 그것을 불행하다고 하거나 비관하지는 않았다.

1000659963.english: – She supplemented her shortcomings in her own way, and there were many around her who helped her.
1000659963.korean: - 그녀는 그녀의 방식으로 자신의 부족함을 보충했고, 그녀의 주위에는 그녀를 도와주는 사람이 많았다.

1000659964.english: – And such a person as her too must have given help to others and felt happiness.
1000659964.korean: - 그리고 그런 그녀 또한 누군가에게 도움을 주고, 행복함을 느끼겠지.

1000659965.english: – That the one she loved was me, words could not describe how happy it made me.
1000659965.korean: - 그녀가 사랑하는 사람이 나라는 것이 얼마나 행복한지 이루 말할 수가 없었다.

1000659966.english: – Yet I had no choice but to express it.

1000659968.english: – I brought my face closer to Hatsuna's.
1000659968.korean: - 나는 하츠나의 얼굴에 내 얼굴을 가까이 했다.

1000659969.english: – Hatsuna smiled shyly and kissed me.
1000659969.korean: - 하츠나는 배시시 웃으며 나와 입을 맞추었다.

1000659970.english: – The withered flower of Muromachi bloomed once again in my arms.
1000659970.korean: - 시들었던 무로마치의 꽃은 내 품에서 다시 피어났다.

1000659973.english: Haha, no. They say food can be enjoyed with the eyes too, right?
1000659973.korean: 하하, 아냐. 음식은 눈으로도 즐길 수 있다고 하잖아.

1000659985.english: I'm not really in the mood for sushi today...

1000659989.english: If you do something weird, I'll scream.
1000659989.korean: 이상한 짓 하면 소리 지를 거야.

1000659996.english: Yeah. I like it a lot.

1000660000.english: ......Let's avoid doing this in a sealed space next time.

1000660001.english: Don't tell me, was that a confession?

1000660002.english: Ah. It's fine. Thanks, Serapias Alice.

1000660003.english: Rather than playing with fire... it's just aromatherapy?

1000660007.english: What's wrong, Kaen? At this late hour.
1000660007.korean: 무슨 일이야, 카엔? 이 늦은 시간에.

1000660019.english: Language isn't the only way to express feelings.
1000660019.korean: 감정을 표현하는 방법이 언어만 있는 것은 아니야.

1000660023.english: At last, the promised time has come, Azazel.

1000660024.english: Yes, the day has dawned when the will of light is fulfilled.
1000660024.korean: 네, 빛의 의지가 실현되는 날이 밝았군요.

1000660026.english: How could one who serves the Light ever lack in preparation?
1000660026.korean: 빛을 섬기는 자, 어찌 대비함에 부족함이 있을까요.

1000660027.english: Excellent. It must be because of such an attitude that the blessing of the Light has descended upon us.
1000660027.korean: 훌륭하다. 그러한 태도가 있기에 빛의 축복이 우리에게 내린 것이겠지.

1000660031.english: Let's tail Angel and the Savior's date!&nWe shall tail Angel and the Savior's date!
1000660031.korean: 엔젤과 구원자님의 데이트를 미행하기로 해요!&n엔젤과 구원자의 데이트를 미행하기로 한다!

1000660032.english: Ahh, to think our adorable Angel is going on a date with the Savior.
1000660032.korean: 아아, 우리 귀여운 천사가 구원자님과 데이트를 한다니.

1000660033.english: With this, we shall be able to spread the teachings of the Light far and wide.
1000660033.korean: 이것으로 빛의 가르침을 널리 퍼트릴 수 있게 되었도다.

1000660034.english: Oh, come now. Must we interpret today's matter that way?

1000660036.english: Insolence! Jealousy is among the sins—are you doubting the sanctity of the Church's Judge?
1000660036.korean: 무례하다! 질투는 죄악의 일종이니 교단 심판자의 신성에 의문을 품는 것인가!

1000660037.english: ......But indeed, to say I feel no envy at all would also be a blasphemy.
1000660037.korean: ......하지만 부럽지 않다고 말하는 것도 망언의 죄를 짓는 것이겠지.

1000660038.english: Yet today is our Angel's date. More than envy, I only wish that Angel's date ends joyfully.
1000660038.korean: 허나 오늘은 우리 엔젤의 데이트 날이다. 부러움 이상으로 엔젤의 데이트가 즐겁게 끝나길 바라고 있다.

1000660039.english: I feel the same. That's why I've done my utmost in helping prepare for Angel's date—from several days ago up until this morning.
1000660039.korean: 저도 마찬가지예요. 그래서 며칠 전부터 오늘 아침까지 최선을 다해서 엔젤의 데이트 준비를 도왔죠.

1000660040.english: You seemed more devoted than even on Holy Consecration Day...
1000660040.korean: 축성일보다 더 열심히 준비하는 거 같던데...

1000660042.english: Well, I'll overlook it. I don't think the chance for the Church's Angel to directly receive the Savior's blessing is any less significant than Consecration Day.
1000660042.korean: 뭐, 이 문제에 대해서는 넘어가지. 교단의 천사가 구원자의 축복을 직접 받을 기회가 축성일보다 중요성이 떨어진다고 생각하지 않으니.

1000660044.english: Ramiel said they'd be absent today to hear the confessions of the faithful.
1000660044.korean: 라미엘은 오늘 신도들의 고해성사를 위해서 빠지겠다고 하더군.

1000660045.english: What a pity. Then shall we help with Angel's date twice as much, in Ramiel's place?
1000660045.korean: 안타깝네요. 그러면 라미엘의 몫까지 열심히 엔젤의 데이트를 도와주도록 할까요.

1000660046.english: Hm? It seems Angel is heading toward the meeting place.
1000660046.korean: 음? 엔젤이 약속장소로 향하는 것 같군.

1000660048.english: Angel is earnest by nature—most likely she intends to arrive early at the meeting spot.
1000660048.korean: 성실한 성격이니 미리 약속장소에 갈 생각이겠지.

1000660050.english: But… I feel like I forgot something…

1000660051.english: Well, if it doesn't come to mind, it must not be important.
1000660051.korean: 뭐, 생각 안나니 중요한 건 아니겠죠.

1000660053.english: Lord Azazel, Lady Saraqael. It is Veronica. May I come in?
1000660053.korean: 아자젤 님, 사라카엘 님. 베로니카입니다. 들어가도 되겠습니까?

1000660058.english: ......Both of you have stepped out, I see.

1000660060.english: Did you forget that today was the day you were supposed to clean the chapel?!
1000660060.korean: 오늘 두 분께서 예배당을 청소하는 날이라는 것을 잊으셨습니까!

1000660062.english: - When I arrived at the meeting place twenty minutes early...

1000660064.english: - The little angel of the Order was already there, waiting for me.
1000660064.korean: - 교단의 작은 천사가 먼저 도착해 나를 기다리고 있었다.

1000660065.english: - Angel's outfit was different from usual.

1000660066.english: - Instead of the garb always worn to serve the Light, she was dressed in pure and graceful clothes that showed her charm.
1000660066.korean: - 평소 빛을 섬기기 위한 교단의 복장만 입던 엔젤은 매력이 돋보이는 청초한 옷을 입고 있었다.

1000660067.english: - Worn for no one else but me.

1000660068.english: - My heart fluttered at that realization.

1000660069.english: - While I was gazing at Angel in captivation, she spotted me and trotted toward me.
1000660069.korean: - 내가 엔젤에게 경도되어 바라보던 중 엔젤이 나를 발견하고 나에게 총총걸음으로 다가왔다.

1000660071.english: No, I also just arrived. And besides, there's still plenty of time left before the appointed hour.
1000660071.korean: 아뇨, 저도 방금 도착했어요. 그리고 약속 시간까지 아직 많이 남았잖아요.

1000660072.english: Ehehe. I-I felt the same way, so I came early too.
1000660072.korean: 에헤헤. 저, 저도 마찬가지라 일찍 왔어요.

1000660073.english: Thank you. In truth, the angels have been looking after me for several days now. If they were to find out about this… huh?
1000660073.korean: 감사해요. 사실 천사님들께서 며칠 전부터 저를 챙겨주셨어요. 그분들께서 아시게 되면... 어라?

1000660077.english: Phew, that was close to being found out.

1000660080.english: Ah… but did you hear their conversation just now?

1000660081.english: A newly dating couple, awkwardness and excitement mixed on their first date, exchanging sweet words…
1000660081.korean: 이제 막 사귀기 시작한 연인이 첫 데이트의 어색함과 들뜬 마음이 혼재되어서 알콩달콩 말을 주고받는데...

1000660082.english: Isn't it just lovely, even just listening?

1000660083.english: Though it's a little disappointing that the Savior lacks enough words to compliment Angel.
1000660083.korean: 다만 구원자께서 엔젤을 칭찬하는 어휘가 부족한 게 약간 아쉽네요.

1000660084.english: He could have said she's as pure as a Lily Bloommerchen of the valley, so cute he wants to protect her, or that she looks like a princess from some kingdom—sweet compliments that make your chest tickle.
1000660084.korean: 방울꽃처럼 청초하다느니, 지켜주고 싶을 정도로 귀엽다느니, 어느 나라의 공주님 같다느니 하는 가슴 간질간질한 칭찬을 해도 될 텐데요.

1000660085.english: ......Why do you know that so well?

1000660088.english: Come to think of it, I thought I saw a book in your room last time… not one of the scriptures of the Order.
1000660088.korean: 그러고 보니 지난번에 네 방에서 교단의 성서가 아닌 다른 책을 본 거 같은데...

1000660089.english: Azazel, surely you haven't accepted teachings outside the Order's, while being in the position of a Guardian!
1000660089.korean: 아자젤이여, 설마 너는 수호자의 위치에 있으면서 교단의 가르침이 아닌 다른 가르침을 받아들인 것이냐!

1000660095.english: The Light is a being that embraces all through love.
1000660095.korean: 빛은 사랑으로 모든 것을 보듬어 주는 존재.

1000660096.english: And the Savior, as the Light's representative, loves us all.
1000660096.korean: 그리고 구원자님께서는 빛의 대리인으로 우리 모두를 사랑해주시죠.

1000660097.english: I, too, received that grace from the Savior and came to know about love, though I'm still lacking.
1000660097.korean: 저 또한 구원자님께 그 은혜를 입고 사랑에 대해서 알게 되었습니다만 아직 부족한 실정입니다.

1000660098.english: And as you know, the Savior is busy. To ask him to give us love solely so we may learn it would damage his spirit of charity.
1000660098.korean: 그리고 알다시피 구원자님께서는 바쁘세요. 저희가 사랑을 알기 위해 우리에게만 사랑을 베풀어 달라는 것은 구원자님의 박애정신을 훼손시키는 일.

1000660099.english: Thus, I used romance novels as a means to learn more about love.
1000660099.korean: 그리하여 저는 사랑에 대해서 더 알기 위해 연애소설이라는 수단을 이용한 것입니다.

1000660100.english: I-it was never for selfish reasons!
1000660100.korean: 겨, 결코 사사로운 마음으로 읽은 게 아니에요!

1000660103.english: A judge of the Light must be firm, but also fair.
1000660103.korean: 빛의 심판자는 단호해야 하는 동시에 공정해야한다.

1000660104.english: Punishing you, or proving your innocence, must only come after weighing whether your words are true or false.
1000660104.korean: 너를 벌하는 것도, 너의 결백을 증명하는 것도 너의 변의 옳고 그름을 따지고 난 이후에 행해야겠지.

1000660106.english: Show me what you have read.

1000660108.english: What I recommend is something Ms. Muse often reads to gain inspiration when composing songs…
1000660108.korean: 제가 추천하는 것은 뮤즈 씨가 노래를 작곡할 때 영감을 얻기 위해 많이 보는...

1000660111.english: Where did the two of them go?

1000660112.english: Uh… huh? Where did they go?

1000660116.english: Savior, this cake is so delicious.

1000660117.english: - Angel, after eating Aurora's strawberry shortcake, widened her eyes and fluttered her small wings.
1000660117.korean: - 아우로라의 딸기 쇼트케이크를 먹은 엔젤은 눈을 동그랗게 뜨고 작은 날개를 파닥였다.

1000660119.english: - Rather than wanting more for herself because it was delicious, Angel's heart was to share because it was delicious. Just like her name, it was truly beautiful.
1000660119.korean: - 맛있으니 더 먹어야지가 아닌, 맛있으니 같이 먹자는 엔젤의 마음씨는 그녀의 이름처럼 무척 고왔다.

1000660122.english: Yes, thank you, I'll have some.

1000660125.english: - Even at my slightest remark, Angel blushed and lowered her head.
1000660125.korean: - 사소한 나의 말에도 엔젤은 얼굴을 붉히고 고개를 숙였다.

1000660126.english: - But seeing Angel's little wings fluttering must make you feel both shy and happy.
1000660126.korean: - 그러나 엔젤의 작은 날개가 파닥이는 것을 보면 쑥스러우면서도 기쁜 것이겠지.

1000660130.english: Hehe, the atmosphere between you two is sweeter than dessert.
1000660130.korean: 후후, 두 사람의 분위기가 디저트보다 더 달콤하네요.

1000660133.english: Huh? I thought you weren't eating it, so I set it aside.
1000660133.korean: 응? 안 먹으니까 옆에 치워 둔 거 아닌가?

1000660134.english: I left it on purpose because I like it!
1000660134.korean: 좋아하는 거니까 일부러 남겨 둔 거라고요!

1000660135.english: Sorry, Azazel. But all things return to the Light. Whether it enters your mouth or mine, is it not the same?
1000660135.korean: 미안하다, 아자젤. 허나 모든 것은 빛의 품으로 돌아가는 것이 순리. 너의 입에 들어가든 나의 입으로 들어가든 똑같지 않겠나.

1000660138.english: O Light, I know that all trials and hardships are within Your providence. Just as iron, heated in fire and struck by the hammer, becomes tougher and stronger, I know that every trial and hardship I face will strengthen my faith.
1000660138.korean: 빛이시여, 모든 고난과 고행은 당신의 안배에 따른 것을 알고 있으매. 불에 달궈지고 망치에 두들겨지는 철이 질겨지고 튼튼해지는 것처럼 제가 맞이하는 모든 고난과 고행이 신앙을 공고히 함을 알고 있나이다.

1000660139.english: The Light has said, "I shall not give My believer a trial they cannot overcome," and so far I have armed myself with faith to endure every hardship and trial.
1000660139.korean: 빛께서 이르시되 내 신앙자에게 이겨내지 못할 고난을 내리지 않노라 하시어 지금까지 모든 고난을 고행을 그 믿음으로 무장하여 이겨냈나이다.

1000660140.english: But I beg of You, look kindly upon this humble cherub, and in this darkest hour grant me but a small strawberry… a single ray of light, that I may take it as a beacon of hope to endure all these trials and hardships…
1000660140.korean: 다만 바라오니 미력한 치품천사를 어여삐 여기시어 지금처럼 가장 어두운 시기에 이끌어 줄 작은 딸기... 작은 빛 한줄기를 내려주시어 그 빛줄기를 희망의 이정표로 삼아 이 모든 고행과 고난을 이겨낼...

1000660142.english: H-here, I'll bring you another strawberry shortcake!
1000660142.korean: 여, 여기 딸기 쇼트케이크 하나 추가하겠다!

1000660144.english: Savior! Look, there seems to be some kind of event over there!
1000660144.korean: 구원자님! 저기서 무슨 행사를 하나 봐요!

1000660145.english: - Where Angel was pointing, the crew of the Orca were holding a flea market, buying and selling secondhand goods.
1000660145.korean: - 엔젤이 가리킨 곳에는 오르카 호 대원들이 중고물품을 사고파는 벼룩시장이 열리고 있었다.

1000660147.english: - I looked around the flea market with Angel.

1000660148.english: - There wasn't anything I particularly needed, but just browsing was fun enough.
1000660148.korean: - 당장 필요한 것은 없었지만 구경하는 것만으로도 재밌었다.

1000660149.english: - Surplus supplies, handicrafts, relics of the old era found during reconnaissance, and the Commander's goods...
1000660149.korean: - 잉여 보급품, 수제품, 정찰 중에 발견한 구시대의 물품들 그리고 사령관 굿ㅈ...

1000660150.english: - Somehow it looked like my photo was being openly sold?
1000660150.korean: - 왠지 내 사진이 버젓이 팔린 거 같았는데?

1000660151.english: - But before I could take a closer look, the seller hurriedly packed up their things and left in a rush.
1000660151.korean: - 하지만 내가 자세히 보기도 전에 출품자는 자신의 물건을 정리하고 허둥지둥 자리를 떠났다.

1000660152.english: Why are you acting like that?

1000660153.english: - Though the suspicion lingered, I forced myself to ignore it.

1000660155.english: - While wandering around for a while, I noticed Angel had taken an interest in something.
1000660155.korean: - 한참을 둘러보던 중 엔젤이 무언가에 흥미를 느끼는 것을 알아챘다.

1000660156.english: - At the end of her gaze…

1000660158.english: - They clearly looked like something an amateur had made, but if Angel was interested, how could I just stand by?
1000660158.korean: - 딱 봐도 아마추어가 만든 느낌이 드는 쿠키였지만 엔젤이 흥미를 느끼는 데 가만히 있을 수야 없지.

1000660159.english: - The seller offered to give them for free, but something well-made should never be handed out for free.
1000660159.korean: - 출품자는 공짜로 주겠다고 했지만 잘하는 것은 공짜로 해주면 안 되는 법.

1000660160.english: - After properly paying, I handed Angel a pouch filled with cookies.
1000660160.korean: - 제대로 계산한 후에 엔젤에게 쿠키가 담긴 주머니를 건넸다.

1000660161.english: Thank… you, Commander. I'll treasure them.

1000660163.english: - Angel hugged the pouch of cookies tightly and fluttered her wings.
1000660163.korean: - 엔젤은 쿠키가 담긴 주머니를 소중하게 끌어안고 날개를 파닥였다.

1000660165.english: Ah, seeing the two of you having such a fun time makes me happy too.
1000660165.korean: 아아, 두 사람이 즐거운 시간을 보내는 것을 보니 저도 즐거워지네요.

1000660170.english: Junk, you say! Aren't they all precious items!

1000660171.english: No, how can you pile up baggage while on surveillance!
1000660171.korean: 아니, 미행 중에 짐을 늘리면 어떡해요!

1000660174.english: Our law may be strict, but others also have their own codes. If we disregard their laws, how can we expect ours to be respected?
1000660174.korean: 우리에게 율법이 지엄하다고 하나 다른 자들에게도 법도가 있다. 우리가 그들의 법도를 무시한다면 우리의 율법이 존중받을 수 있겠나.

1000660175.english: And you're saying that while always putting the order's law above everything else?
1000660175.korean: 평소에는 교단의 율법을 최우선시하면서 그런 소리 하기에요?

1000660176.english: Ah! The two of them are moving! Hurry and go return those!
1000660176.korean: 아! 두 사람이 이동하잖아요! 어서 반품하고 오세요!

1000660177.english: W-wait! At least let me keep this one!

1000660185.english: - Angel, like a puppy out on a walk, was fascinated by everything.
1000660185.korean: - 엔젤은 산책을 나온 강아지처럼 모든 것에 흥미를 느꼈다.

1000660186.english: - But Angel didn't move only according to her own interests.
1000660186.korean: - 하지만 엔젤은 자신의 흥미에만 따라서 움직이는 것은 아니었다.

1000660188.english: - Whenever she found something good, fun, beautiful, or fragrant, she always offered it to me first.
1000660188.korean: - 좋은 것, 재미있는 것, 아름다운 것, 향기로운 것을 발견하면 가장 먼저 나에게 권했다.

1000660189.english: - That sight was so lovely I could hardly endure it.
1000660189.korean: - 그 모습이 너무나도 사랑스러워서 견딜 수가 없었다.

1000660190.english: - Then suddenly I realized Angel had grown tired.
1000660190.korean: - 그러다가 문득 나는 엔젤이 지쳤다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000660191.english: - Come to think of it, Angel had a special ability.
1000660191.korean: - 그러고 보니 엔젤에게는 특별한 능력이 있었다.

1000660192.english: - Angel must be exhausted because of that ability.
1000660192.korean: - 엔젤이 지친 건 그 능력 때문이겠지.

1000660193.english: Yes! If it's what the Savior wishes…

1000660194.english: I'm always ready to follow you!

1000660196.english: The two of them got on a boat!

1000660197.english: We should also—no, that won't do. We stand out too much.
1000660197.korean: 우리도 보트를... 안 되겠군. 우리가 너무 눈에 띈다.

1000660198.english: Come, let's change into the clothes I bought.

1000660199.english: Aren't these clothes not yet consecrated?
1000660199.korean: 이 옷 아직 축성받지 않은 옷 아닌가요?

1000660200.english: That doctrine was made to prevent lust from sprouting in one's heart by touching impure things.
1000660200.korean: 해당 교리는 부정한 것을 몸에 댐으로 인해 마음 속에 음욕이 피어나는 것을 피하라는 취지로 만들어진 것.

1000660201.english: However, our current situation can be interpreted as an emergency measure to witness the miracle of an angel of the order being blessed by the representative of the Light.
1000660201.korean: 허나 지금 우리의 상황은 교단의 천사가 빛의 대리인에게 축복받는 기적의 순간을 목격하기 위한 일종의 비상조치라 해석할 수 있다.

1000660202.english: The Judge of the Order, Saraqael, recognizes the present situation as a just act.
1000660202.korean: 교단의 심판자 사라카엘은 지금의 상황을 정당행위라고 인정한다.

1000660203.english: Fufu, Saraqael, you've softened quite a bit. In a good way.
1000660203.korean: 후후, 사라카엘도 많이 부드러워지셨네요. 좋은 방향으로요.

1000660204.english: Once we've changed, let's ride that swan boat!
1000660204.korean: 옷을 다 갈아입으면 저 오리배를 타도록 하죠!

1000660205.english: - Rowed the boat to the center of the lake formed in the Ark.
1000660205.korean: - 방주에 조성된 호수의 중심까지 보트를 저었다.

1000660206.english: - From far away, bustling noises could be heard, but they weren't bothersome.
1000660206.korean: - 저기 멀리서 북적북적한 소리가 들려오지만, 신경에 거슬리는 정도는 아니었다.

1000660209.english: - For Angel, who has telepathic abilities, crowded places must be difficult.
1000660209.korean: - 정신감응 능력이 있는 엔젤에게는 사람들이 많은 곳이 힘들 것이다.

1000660210.english: - I guess the reason Angel, who’s usually so calm, was so excited was because she was using her psychic powers in a place full of excited people.
1000660210.korean: - 평소에는 침착한 엔젤이 잔뜩 들떠 있던 것도 흥분한 사람들이 많은 곳에서 정신감응을 했기 때문이겠지.

1000660211.english: - Once it was just the two of us, Angel also calmed down.
1000660211.korean: - 단 둘만 있게 되자 엔젤도 얌전해졌다.

1000660215.korean: 죄송해요, 제가 너무 신경 쓰이게 해드려서...

1000660216.english: I'm sorry, for making you worry...

1000660217.english: But I didn't dislike it. When I stood beside the Orca crew and connected with them, the hope and joy I felt from their hearts filled me to the brim.
1000660217.korean: 오르카 여러분들의 옆에서 그분들과 정신감응을 하면서 느껴지는 희망과 기쁨에 저도 가슴이 벅차올랐어요.

1000660218.english: - At my words, Angel blushed again. Even so, she looked at me and spoke.
1000660218.korean: - 내 말에 엔젤은 다시 얼굴을 붉혔다. 그러는 와중에도 엔젤은 나를 바라보며 말했다.

1000660219.english: And when I realized that the source of all that hope and joy was the person beside me, my heart overflowed beyond telepathy.
1000660219.korean: 그리고 그 모든 희망과 기쁨의 근원이 제 옆에 계신 분이라는 것을 알게 되자 정신감응과 별개로 가슴이 벅차올랐어요.

1000660220.english: I thought, the Savior isn't just my Savior, but the Savior of everyone...
1000660220.korean: 구원자님은 저의 구원자일 뿐만이 아니라 모두의 구원자로구나... 하고요.

1000660221.english: As I walk around the Orca, I pass by many people.
1000660221.korean: 오르카 호를 돌아다니다 보면 여러 사람의 곁을 지나게 돼요.

1000660222.english: And each time, their hearts flow into me.
1000660222.korean: 그럴 때마다 그 사람들의 마음이 저에게 흘러들어와요.

1000660223.english: Feelings differ from person to person, but there's always a common one.
1000660223.korean: 감정은 사람마다 다 다르지만, 공통적인 감정이 있어요.

1000660225.english: Each time I feel the emotions of many people, that affection swells as it is absorbed into the affection inside me.
1000660225.korean: 여러 사람의 감정을 느낄 때마다 그 애정들은 제 안의 애정에 흡수되어 부풀어 오르죠.

1000660226.english: And now… the one who is the object of my affection is staying by my side only for me.
1000660226.korean: 그리고 지금...제 애정의 대상이신 분께서 오직 저만을 위해서, 제 곁을 함께 해주고 계세요.

1000660227.english: That fact… makes me so ecstatic.
1000660227.korean: 그 사실이... 저를 무척이나 황홀하게 해요.

1000660228.english: - Hearing Angel's shy confession, I became embarrassed.
1000660228.korean: - 엔젤의 수줍은 고백을 듣자 나는 부끄러워졌다.

1000660229.english: - And beyond that… Angel became even more lovable.

1000660230.english: The Savior's… feelings… are flowing into me.

1000660231.english: - Even without words, Angel could sense my emotions.
1000660231.korean: - 말하지 않아도, 엔젤은 나의 감정을 알 수 있었다.

1000660232.english: - But I wanted to express my heart even more.
1000660232.korean: - 그러나 나는 그 이상으로 내 마음을 표현하고 싶었다.

1000660233.english: - I set down the oar and leaned toward Angel.
1000660233.korean: - 나는 노를 놓고, 엔젤을 향해 몸을 기울였다.

1000660236.english: - Angel closed her eyes and leaned her head forward.

1000660237.english: - I kissed Angel's small, soft lips.
1000660237.korean: - 나는 엔젤의 작고 부드러운 입술에 입을 맞추며.

1000660238.english: - And used Angel's hat to hide our faces.

1000660239.english: - Because out of the corner of my eye, I noticed two familiar people on a duck boat watching us.
1000660239.korean: - 시야 한 편에 익숙한 두 사람이 오리배를 타고 우리를 바라보는 것을 알아챘으니까.

1000660240.english: - But the kiss with Angel was so blissful that it made me forget about the two of them.
1000660240.korean: - 그러나 엔젤과의 입맞춤은 두 사람을 잊게 할 정도로 황홀했다.

1000660241.english: - I did not have Angel's telepathic ability.

1000660242.english: - But in this moment, I could clearly tell that Angel felt the same way as I did.
1000660242.korean: - 지금 이 순간만큼은 엔젤도 나와 같은 마음이라는 것을 절실히 알 수 있었다.

1000660245.english: What do you mean look. It's hidden by the hat.

1000660246.english: That's what makes it good. That.

1000660248.english: Isn't a kiss with faces subtly hidden like that more charming than one shown blatantly?
1000660248.korean: 노골적으로 보이는 것보다, 저렇게 슬쩍 얼굴을 가리는 키스가 더 매력적이지 않나요?

1000660249.english: It's saying that even though it's embarrassing to be seen by others, their overflowing affection for each other makes it impossible to endure without kissing.
1000660249.korean: 남들에게 보이기 부끄럽지만, 그 이상으로 서로에 대한 애정이 넘쳐 키스하지 않고선 버틸 수 없는 상황이라는 말이잖아요.

1000660250.english: Hmm, if we move just a little more to the side, I think we'll see…
1000660250.korean: 흠, 조금만 더 옆으로 가면 보일 거 같은데...

1000660253.english: Ah! That's unfair! You're keeping it to yourself!

1000660254.english: If you hadn't told me to return it, you would've had your share. That's your karma.
1000660254.korean: 네가 반품하라는 말만 하지 않았다면 네 몫도 있었겠지. 너의 업보다.

1000660256.english: Stop grumbling and pedal harder. Once we move to a good spot, I'll lend it to you.
1000660256.korean: 그만 궁시렁거리고 더 페달을 밟아라. 보기 좋은 위치로 이동하면 빌려줄 테니까.

1000660260.english: The kiss… the blessing is over.

1000660262.english: - Leaving just a finger's width of distance, we looked at each other.
1000660262.korean: - 손가락 하나만큼의 거리를 두고 우리는 서로를 마주 보았다.

1000660263.english: - I wanted to kiss her once more, but I sensed that Angel wanted to say something, so I suppressed my desire and waited for her next words.
1000660263.korean: - 다시 한번 입을 맞추고 싶었지만, 나는 엔젤이 무언가 말을 하고 싶은 것이 있다는 것을 느꼈기에 욕구를 억누르고 엔젤의 다음 말을 기다렸다.

1000660264.english: - Angel caught her breath and then spoke.
1000660264.korean: - 엔젤은 숨을 고른 후 입을 열었다.

1000660265.english: Sometimes I wonder what would've happened if I had never met you, Savior.
1000660265.korean: 가끔 제가 구원자님을 만나지 못했다면 어떻게 됐을지 생각해 본 적이 있어요.

1000660266.english: The cool breeze blowing, the glittering sunlight, and even this feeling… I would never have known them.
1000660266.korean: 불어오는 선선한 바람, 반짝거리는 햇살, 그리고 이 마음까지... 알 수 없었을 거예요.

1000660267.english: Yes, the very emotions you are feeling right now, Savior.
1000660267.korean: 맞아요, 지금 구원자님이 느끼고 계신 감정이요.

1000660268.english: …From now on, I'll call you "partner"! I hope you'll like that more,
1000660268.korean: ...앞으로 반려님! 이라고 부를게요. 그 편을 더 좋아해 주시고,

1000660269.english: And I… feel my heart race even more.

1000660270.english: - After finishing her words, this time Angel kissed me first.
1000660270.korean: - 말을 마친 엔젤은 이번에는 자신이 먼저 나에게 입을 맞춰왔다.

1000660271.english: - I accepted the kiss of my lovely little angel.
1000660271.korean: - 나는 사랑스러운 작은 천사의 입맞춤을 받아주었다.

1000660272.english: Our little angel taking the lead like that.
1000660272.korean: 우리 작은 천사가 저렇게 적극적으로 나서다니.

1000660273.english: Azazel, I've trampled you a hundred times over.
